Union Station.name: Union Station
Union Station.description: You are in Union Station, the busiest transit hub in Canada, connecting GO Transit, VIA Rail, and the TTC. The crowd moves endlessly around you. TMU station is NorthEast and Museum station is NorthWest.

items.name: PRESTO
items.description: A small black card used to pay for transit. Funds are limited.

TMU Station.name: TMU Station
TMU Station.description: You step out into the busy downtown core near Toronto Metropolitan University. Students rush past, and the city hums with energy. Streetcars rattle nearby.

items.name: TMU ID CARD
items.description: Your student ID card for TMU.

items.name: Screwdriver
items.description: A small tool that could be useful in the future.

Bloor-Yonge Station.name: Bloor-Yonge Station
Bloor-Yonge Station.description: You are currently in Canadas busiest subway station. From here you can connect to Line 2 Bloor-Danforth. East to Kennedy and West to Kipling.

Eglinton Station.name: Eglinton Station
Eglinton Station.description: You are currently in Toronto's newest subway station with connection to Line 5 Eglinton. You can go east to Kennedy and west to Mount Dennis.

Sheppard-Yonge Station.name: Sheppard-Yonge Station
Sheppard-Yonge Station.description: You are currently located at Sheppard Yonge. From here you can connect to Line 4 Sheppard.

Finch Station.name: Finch Station
Finch Station.description: You are in Finch Station, the station is a hub for commuters heading to the York Region beyond Toronto's border.

Don Mills Station.name: Don Mills Station
Don Mills Station.description: You are in Don Mills Station, the station is a hub for commuters heading to Scarbrough.

Museum Station.name: Museum Station
Museum Station.description: You are in Museum Station, a quiet stop on the TTC line. There are artifacts and totem poles on display, and the station has a calm atmosphere.

items.name: Artifact
items.description: An ancient artifact on display at the museum.

Kipling Station.name: Kipling Station
Kipling Station.description: You are in Kipling Station, the station is quiet and the air is filled with the scent of fresh coffee from a nearby café. The station is a hub for commuters heading to the airport and the suburbs.

Dundas West Station.name: Dundas West Station
Dundas West Station.description: You are in Dundas West Station, a busy stop on the TTC line. The station is known for its vibrant atmosphere and diverse crowd.

items.name: Crowbar
items.description: A sturdy crowbar that could be useful for prying open stuck objects.

Broadview Station.name: Broadview Station
Broadview Station.description: You are in Broadview Station, lights flicker as a crackhead roams the hallway. He's staring right at you, maybe you should talk to him...

Pape Station.name: Pape Station
Pape Station.description: You are in Pape Station, a statue of Mr. Pape stands in the middle of the station.

Main Street Station.name: Main Street Station
Main Street Station.description: You are in Main Street Station, you're almost at the end of line 2.

Kennedy Station.name: Kennedy Station
Kennedy Station.description: You are in Kennedy Station, the terminal station on Line 2, and line 5. You hear the noise of a nearby power station...

items.name: TTC_Employee_Card
items.description: This key unlocks restricted areas that are limited to TTC employees.

Don Valley Station.name: Don Valley Station
Don Valley Station.description: You are in Don Valley Station, the station is dimly lit and the air is filled with a faint hum of machinery.

items.name: Flashlight
items.description: A reliable flashlight that can illuminate dark areas.

Cedarvale Station.name: Cedarvale Station
Cedarvale Station.description: You are in Cedarvale Station, the station is a hub for commuters heading to the suburbs.

Mount Dennis Station.name: Mount Dennis Station
Mount Dennis Station.description: You are in Mount Dennis Station, the station is a hub for commuters heading to the airport and beyond Toronto's border.

Finch West Station.name: Finch West Station
Finch West Station.description: You are currently in Finch West Station. A big interchange station consist of Line 1 and Line 6. From here you can go beyond Toronto's border, into York Region.

Vaughan Metropolitan Centre Station.name: Vaughan Metropolitan Centre Station
Vaughan Metropolitan Centre Station.description: You are currently in the western Terminal of Line 1 Yonge University. VMC station is located in York Region. This station is one of the first TTC stations in York Region.

Jane and Finch Station.name: Jane and Finch Station
Jane and Finch Station.description: You are currently located in a very well known area in Toronto.

Humber College Station.name: Humber College Station
Humber College Station.description: You are currently located at Humber College Station. From here you can connect to TTC, YRT, GO, as well as MiWay.

Power Station.name: Power Station
Power Station.description: You have ended up at a restricted zone, you a power station in front of you. It looks like it requires some works on it.
